name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit personal loans at its Atlanta storefront, accepting all credit types with same-day funding available.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates a brick-and-mortar lending location at 1919 Metropolitan Pkwy SW in Atlanta, Georgia (phone: 404-994-3414). The company positions itself as an accessible lender for borrowers with poor or no credit history, maintaining extended hours seven days a week and offering both in-store and online application pathways. Its website advertises online payday loans up to $5,000 alongside its full suite of in-store products.

The company's core offerings include cash advance loans (up to $1,000), payday loans (up to $1,000), and same-day loans requiring minimal documentation. For borrowers needing larger sums, Superb Cash Advance also lists bad credit personal loans ranging from $250 to $50,000. All advertised products are described as unsecured, meaning no collateral is required for the standard lineup. Customer reviews additionally reference installment loans and second lien title loans as products available at some locations.

Superb Cash Advance differentiates itself primarily on accessibility: it explicitly accepts all credit types across every product, and its storefront hours—8:30am to 8:30pm weekdays and 9:30am to 6:30pm on weekends—are considerably longer than typical payday lenders. The quick approval process and same-day cash disbursement are central to its value proposition for borrowers facing urgent financial needs.

Borrowers should approach with caution on several fronts. The website provides no APR disclosures, fee schedules, or repayment term details for any product—a significant transparency gap that makes comparison shopping impossible without an in-person visit. Additionally, multiple customer reviews displayed on the Atlanta location page reference 'Arvada' (a city in Colorado), raising questions about whether the review content is location-specific or recycled across branches. Payday and cash advance products at lenders of this type routinely carry triple-digit APRs; borrowers must request written loan terms before signing.
address: 10561 Old St Augustine Rd #101, Jacksonville, FL 32257

company_info.headquarters: 10561 Old St Augustine Rd #101, Jacksonville, FL 32257

pros: Accepts all credit types explicitly across every loan product
Same-day funding available with minimal documentation required
Bad credit personal loans up to $50,000 for larger borrowing needs
Extended hours 7 days a week — weekdays until 8:30pm, weekends until 6:30pm
Both in-store and online application options available
All standard loan products are unsecured (no collateral required)
4.0 customer rating with reviews citing fast approval and friendly staff
cons: No APR, interest rate, or fee disclosures anywhere on the website
Multiple reviews reference an 'Arvada' location, not Atlanta — review authenticity is questionable
Core cash advance and payday loan products capped at $1,000, limiting usefulness for larger needs
No mention of credit bureau reporting or credit-building features
Payday and cash advance products at this type of lender typically carry very high rates not disclosed on-site
best_for: Borrowers with bad or no credit who need emergency cash up to $1,000 the same day
Consumers who prefer in-person lending with extended evening and weekend hours
Bad-credit borrowers needing larger personal loans ($250–$50,000) declined elsewhere
People who want a no-credit-check option with a straightforward application process
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best suited for Atlanta consumers with bad or no credit who need small-dollar emergency funds quickly and prefer in-person service with extended hours. The critical caveat is a complete absence of rate and fee transparency — no APR or cost information appears anywhere on the site, so borrowers must request full written terms before committing and should expect high-cost loan structures typical of payday and cash advance lenders.
services: Second lien title loans (referenced in customer reviews)
